ddls:
CREATE TABLE "laptops" (
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laptop model */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company manufacturing the laptop */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of laptop (e.g., Ultrabook, Notebook) */,
  "inches" REAL /* Size of the laptop screen in inches */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Screen resolution of the laptop */,
  "cpu" TEXT /* CPU specifications of the laptop */,
  "ram" TEXT /* RAM capacity of the laptop */,
  "memory" TEXT /* Memory and storage specifications of the laptop */,
  "gpu" TEXT /* GPU specifications of the laptop */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operating system of the laptop */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the laptop */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the laptop */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the laptop model */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the laptop model is discontinued */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* Warranty offered with the laptop */,
  "battery_life" TEXT /* Battery life of the laptop */,
  "colors" TEXT /* Available colors for the laptop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laptop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laptops_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laptops_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laptops_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website URL */,
  "address" TEXT /* Company physical address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Company phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Ultrabook, Notebook) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system (e.g., macOS, Windows) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the operating system (e.g., 32-bit, 64-bit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "historical_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laptop model */,
  "price" REAL /* Historical price of the laptop */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laptop model */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of laptops in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Warehouse location of the laptops */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each laptop model
